info.title: AI DBA Workbench API
info.description: REST API for AI DBA Workbench - PostgreSQL monitoring and AI-assisted database administration

get.description: Returns the connection hierarchy, rule defaults, and existing overrides at all applicable scopes for a given connection and rule. Used by the alert override edit dialog.

200.description: Override context with hierarchy and existing overrides

get.description: Returns all alert rules with their override values at the specified scope

200.description: List of alert rules with overrides

put.description: Creates or updates an alert threshold override at the specified scope for a rule

delete.description: Removes an alert threshold override, reverting to the inherited or default value

get.description: Returns all configured alert rules
Returns a specific alert rule by ID

put.description: Updates an alert rule. Requires manage_alert_rules permission.

get.description: Returns alerts with optional filtering

post.description: Acknowledges an alert with an optional message

put.description: Saves an AI-generated analysis for a specific alert

get.description: Returns counts of active alerts grouped by server and severity

post.description: Authenticate a user and obtain a session token
Clears the session cookie to log the user out

get.description: Returns blackout schedules, optionally filtered by scope

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Filter by scope (estate, group, cluster, server)

post.description: Creates a new recurring blackout schedule

get.description: Returns a specific blackout schedule by ID

put.description: Updates a blackout schedule

get.description: Returns blackouts, optionally filtered by scope and status

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Filter by scope (estate, group, cluster, server)

post.description: Creates a new alert blackout window

get.description: Returns a specific blackout by ID

put.description: Updates a blackout's reason or end time

post.description: Stops an active blackout early by setting its end time to now

get.description: Returns server capability flags including AI feature availability
Returns notification channel overrides for a specific scope

put.description: Creates or updates a channel override at the specified scope

delete.description: Deletes a channel override at the specified scope

post.description: Compacts chat history to reduce token usage while preserving important context

get.description: Returns all cluster groups

post.description: Creates a new cluster group

get.description: Returns a specific cluster group

put.description: Updates a cluster group

get.description: Returns all clusters belonging to a group

post.summary: Create a cluster in a group
post.description: Creates a new cluster within a group

get.description: Returns the full cluster hierarchy including groups, clusters, and servers

post.description: Creates a new cluster, optionally assigned to a group

get.description: Returns a flat list of all clusters for autocomplete and selection UIs
Returns a specific cluster

put.description: Updates cluster name, description, or group assignment

get.description: Returns replication relationships for a cluster
Returns all servers belonging to a cluster

post.description: Assigns a server connection to a cluster with an optional role

delete.description: Removes a server connection from a cluster

parameters.name: connectionId
parameters.description: Connection ID of server to remove

get.description: Returns all database connections available to the user

post.description: Creates a new database connection

get.description: Returns the currently selected connection for the session

post.description: Sets the connection for the current session

get.description: Returns a specific connection by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing connection

get.description: Returns all databases accessible via the specified connection
Returns all conversations for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a new conversation

delete.description: Deletes all conversations for the user (requires ?all=true)

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm deletion

get.description: Returns a specific conversation with all messages

put.description: Updates a conversation with new messages

post.description: Sends messages to the configured LLM and returns the response

400.description: Invalid request or provider not configured

get.description: Returns available models for a specific provider
Returns available LLM providers and the default model
Returns the MCP tools available to the current user based on RBAC filtering

post.description: Executes a named MCP tool with the provided arguments

get.description: Returns chat memories for the current user

patch.description: Updates the pinned status of a memory

pinned.description: Whether the memory should be pinned

delete.description: Deletes a specific memory by ID

get.description: Returns baseline values for metrics on a specific connection
Returns per-database summaries for a connection
Returns a performance summary for one or more connections
Queries time-series metrics for one or more connections
Returns the top queries by execution time, calls, or other metrics

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of queries to return

get.description: Returns all notification channels

post.description: Creates a new notification channel (email, Slack, Mattermost, or webhook)

get.description: Returns a specific notification channel by ID

put.description: Updates a notification channel

get.description: Returns all email recipients for a notification channel

post.description: Adds an email recipient to a notification channel

put.description: Updates an email recipient

delete.description: Removes an email recipient from a notification channel

post.description: Sends a test notification through the channel

get.description: Returns an AI-generated overview of the monitored estate, optionally scoped
Streams overview generation progress via Server-Sent Events (SSE)
Returns probe configurations, optionally filtered by connection ID
Returns a specific probe configuration by ID

put.description: Updates a probe configuration. Requires manage_probes permission.

get.description: Returns probe overrides for a specific scope (server, cluster, or group)

put.description: Creates or updates a probe override at the specified scope

delete.description: Deletes a probe override at the specified scope

get.description: Returns all RBAC groups with member counts

post.description: Creates a new RBAC group

get.description: Returns a group with its members, privileges, and permissions

put.description: Updates a group's name or description

get.description: Returns the effective privileges for a group, including inherited privileges

post.description: Adds a user or nested group as a member. Provide either user_id or group_id.

delete.description: Removes a user or group member from the group

get.description: Returns the admin permissions assigned to a group

put.description: Sets the admin permissions for a group

get.description: Returns the connection-level privileges assigned to a group

put.description: Sets the connection-level privileges for a group

get.description: Returns the MCP tool privileges assigned to a group

put.description: Sets the MCP tool privileges for a group

get.description: Returns all available MCP privilege identifiers
Returns all API tokens with scope information. Requires manage_token_scopes permission.

post.description: Creates a new API token for the specified user. The raw token is returned only once.

get.description: Returns the scope restrictions for a token

put.description: Sets scope restrictions for a token including connections, MCP privileges, and admin permissions

delete.description: Removes all scope restrictions from a token

get.description: Returns all users. Requires manage_users permission.

post.description: Creates a new user or service account. Requires manage_users permission.

put.description: Updates a user's details. Requires manage_users permission.

delete.description: Deletes a user. Requires manage_users permission.

get.description: Returns the effective privileges for a user, including inherited group privileges
Returns comprehensive server information including OS, PostgreSQL, databases, extensions, and settings
Returns AI-generated analysis of databases on the specified server
Returns timeline events within a time range
Returns authentication status and user information

connection_id.description: Connection ID of the server to add

metric_value.description: Metric value when alert was triggered

has_override.description: Whether an override exists at this scope

is_active.description: Whether the blackout is currently active

has_override.description: Whether an override exists at this scope

is_estate_default.description: Whether this is an estate default

enabled.description: Whether the channel is enabled at this scope

debug.description: Enable debug mode for token usage

tools.description: MCP tools available to the LLM

group_id.description: Group ID to assign cluster to

recent_window.description: Number of recent messages to always keep

LoginResponse.description: The session token is transmitted via httpOnly cookie, not in the response body

isError.description: Whether the tool call resulted in an error

is_estate_default.description: Whether this is an estate default channel
Whether this is an estate default channel

has_override.description: Whether an override exists at this scope

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default provider

is_service_account.description: Whether the owner is a service account

is_superuser.description: Whether the owner is a superuser

is_service_account.description: Whether the user is a service account

is_superuser.description: Whether the user is a superuser

metric_value.description: Metric value at time of analysis

scoped.description: Whether the token has scope restrictions

is_service_account.description: Whether the user is a service account

is_superuser.description: Whether the user is a superuser
Whether the user has superuser privileges

connection_privileges.description: Connection ID to access level mapping

is_superuser.description: Whether the user is a superuser
Whether the user is a superuser
